title: Cuneiform Tablet #0215: Achaemenid Court Record
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a court record document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Achaemenid period — a court record document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Achaemenid period. Court Record document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records court record matters typical of Achaemenid period administrative or literary practice.
